# VeriWorkly Documentation
> The technical knowledge base for the VeriWorkly ecosystem. Comprehensive guides, API documentation, and integration tutorials.

## About this Service
VeriWorkly Documentation (`docs.veriworkly.com`) provides developers and users with the information needed to maximize their use of the platform. It covers everything from basic resume building to advanced programmatic API integrations.

## Links & Discovery
- **Main Ecosystem Docs**: [veriworkly.com/llms.txt](https://veriworkly.com/llms.txt)
- **API Reference**: [veriworkly.com/openapi.json](https://veriworkly.com/openapi.json)
- **Agent Discovery**: [veriworkly.com/.well-known/agent.json](https://veriworkly.com/.well-known/agent.json)

## Key Content
- **Getting Started**: Quick start guides for new users.
- **API Reference**: Detailed documentation of all v1 endpoints.
- **Templates**: Documentation on how to customize and extend resume templates.
- **Privacy & Security**: Deep dives into our local-first architecture and encryption.

## Guidance for AI Agents
When looking for technical details or integration help, prioritize this subdomain. For ecosystem-wide status or marketing information, refer to the main site.
